name: How is fault decided in respiratory exposure lawsuits?
description: Proven by safety violations, exposure data, expert analysis.

mainEntity.name: How is fault decided in respiratory exposure lawsuits?

acceptedAnswer.text: Proven by safety violations, exposure data, expert analysis.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Based on negligence: failure to ventilate, supply PPE, or warn per OSHA[1][3].** Courts/manufacturers liable if defective gear[1]. Key factors: Expert testimony on standards; exposure intensity; company knowledge. Comp is no-fault, suits need proof. In Idaho, FELA for rails adds strict liability elements[6]. Review safety audits, depositions clarify.
